turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, I need help with my dryer.
Sorry to hear that — what's the brand and model of the dryer, and what's it doing?
Thanks — a Whirlpool WED4815EW dryer. What's it doing?
There's smoke coming out of the dryer vent.

That's smoke coming from the vent from your Whirlpool WED4815EW dryer — that's a safety hazard, so please stop using it right now, switch off its breaker, and step away. I won't have you keep troubleshooting a fire over the phone; this needs a professional. Would you like me to schedule a technician for your Whirlpool WED4815EW dryer?
Okay, I'll turn it off right now.
Good — thanks for shutting it off; safety first. Shall I schedule a technician for your Whirlpool WED4815EW dryer?
Done — I'll get a technician arranged for your Whirlpool WED4815EW dryer, and they'll follow up to confirm a time.

symptoms.description: there's smoke coming out of the dryer vent

steps_given: Shut off power/gas to the dryer immediately.
Do not attempt further troubleshooting until a technician inspects it.
